rules.rule_text:
rule TABMSGSQL_APT1
{
	meta:
		author = "AlienVault Labs"
		info = "CommentCrew-threat-apt1"

	strings:
		$s1 = "letusgohtppmmv2.0.0.1" wide ascii
		$s2 = "Mozilla/4.0 (compatible; )" wide ascii
		$s3 = "filestoc" wide ascii
		$s4 = "filectos" wide ascii
		$s5 = "reshell" wide ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
